description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly dark, almost black surface interspersed with rusty brown and grayish streaks. The rock's surface is coarse and uneven, featuring jagged ridges and natural fractures that suggest it has been weathered over time. Its coloration hints at a composition rich in minerals such as iron, giving it a mottled appearance. The edges are sharp in some areas and more rounded in others, indicating a mix of breakage and erosion. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or inclusions. Its overall form and texture make it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban environment.
description: A dark, jagged rock with rough, angular surfaces and streaks of brown and gray, showing signs of weathering and mineral deposits.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and flat with visible brown and gray streaks across a mostly dark, rugged surface.
description_view_1: This side reveals a thinner, more elongated profile with pronounced dark coloration and less visible mineral streaking.
description_view_2: The rock looks more compact and rounded from this angle, with mottled brown and black tones dominating the surface.
description_view_3: A relatively flat and dark face is visible, with subtle texture and minimal color variation compared to other views.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
